title: Emotional vs Physical Intimacy
caption: How balanced is your intimacy?
layout: Two-column comparison. Left column highlights characteristics of emotional intimacy, with sections on trust, vulnerability, and communication. Right column focuses on physical intimacy, detailing touch, desire, and connection. A conclusion at the bottom encourages reflection on where you might need more balance.

title: The Cycle of Attraction
caption: Ever wondered how attraction shifts over time?
layout: Cycle diagram showing the stages of attraction: Initial Spark, Deepening Connection, Erosion of Passion, and Rediscovery. Each section includes brief descriptions of emotions and actions that occur in each stage, concluding with tips for reigniting attraction.

title: Navigating Midlife Relationships
caption: What stage are you in regarding relationship growth?
layout: 4-stage progression chart depicting: Recognising Patterns, Communicating Needs, Embracing Change, and Cultivating Joy. Each stage contains key practices and insights for each phase, encouraging personal reflection.

title: Mind-Body Connection: A Midlife Guide
caption: How tuned in are you to your body’s signals?
layout: 2x2 grid with 'Mind' and 'Body' on one axis and 'Positive' and 'Negative' experiences on the other. Each quadrant features insights and practical tips on enhancing awareness and connection, helping women navigate their feelings.

title: Sexual Wellness: Myths vs Facts
caption: What myths might be holding you back?
layout: Two-column table listing common myths about sexuality after 40 on the left, and facts debunking them on the right. The table aims to educate and empower, leading to an informed perspective on sexual health.

title: Building Emotional Resilience
caption: How do you handle emotional challenges?
layout: Cycle diagram outlining steps to build emotional resilience: Acknowledge Feelings, Reframe Thoughts, Seek Support, Take Action. Each step includes practical strategies, emphasising the importance of emotional well-being in midlife.

title: The Art of Reclaiming Pleasure
caption: When was the last time you prioritised pleasure?
layout: 4-stage progression showcasing: Self-Discovery, Setting Intentions, Exploring New Forms of Pleasure, and Integrating into Daily Life. Each section includes actionable steps that guide women in creating a pleasurable lifestyle.

title: Body Image Through the Decades
caption: How has your body image evolved over time?
layout: Timeline with key milestones in body image perception from twenties through fifties. Each decade features common societal pressures and personal reflections with positive affirmations to empower acceptance.

title: Intimacy Across Cultures
caption: What does intimacy mean to you?
layout: Two-column comparison of intimacy concepts in two different cultures, each highlighting unique values, practices, and beliefs. The infographic aims to broaden understanding and appreciation of diverse intimacy forms.

title: The Power of Vulnerability
caption: Are you ready to embrace vulnerability?
layout: Cycle diagram depicting the journey of vulnerability: Opening Up, Building Trust, Navigating Fear, and Experiencing Connection. Each stage elaborates on emotions felt and strategies to overcome fears, encouraging deeper connections.

title: Building Your Desire Sanctuary
caption: What does your desire sanctuary look like?
layout: 4-stage progression with phases: Creating a Safe Space, Inviting Exploration, Embracing Sensuality, and Nurturing Connection. Each section contains tips on fostering a personal environment conducive to desire.

title: Redefining Passion in Midlife
caption: How do you define passion after 40?
layout: 2x2 grid contrasting traditional notions of passion with midlife perspectives, exploring emotional, physical, intellectual, and creative aspects of passion. Each section offers reflections and encourages personalisation.

title: The Midlife Relationship Check-in
caption: When was your last relationship check-in?
layout: Two-column format where the left side lists essential questions for self-reflection, while the right side suggests conversation starters for partners. It encourages proactive communication for relationship health.

title: Navigating Sexual Change
caption: How can you embrace sexual evolution?
layout: Cycle chart illustrating stages: Awareness, Acceptance, Adaptation, and Exploration. Each stage breaks down emotions and actions necessary to embrace the changes in sexual life during midlife.

title: Fostering Connection in Long-Term Relationships
caption: How connected do you feel with your partner?
layout: 4-stage progression: Sharing Experiences, Engaging in New Activities, Regular Check-ins, and Creating Together. Each stage provides practical ideas to deepen connection and intimacy.

title: Communicating Desires Effectively
caption: How easy do you find it to express what you want?
layout: Four-step graphic detailing: Clarity of Desire, Choosing the Right Time, Using 'I' Statements, and Inviting Feedback. Each step offers tips to encourage open, honest discussions about desires.

title: Finding Balance: Career and Relationships
caption: Is your career taking precedence over love?
layout: Two-column comparison outlining the benefits and drawbacks of prioritising career versus relationships. Each section suggests actions to achieve balance and promote harmony.

title: Transforming Conflict into Connection
caption: How can conflict lead to deeper intimacy?
layout: Cycle diagram illustrating stages: Initial Conflict, Reflecting on Feelings, Open Communication, and Reconnection. Each phase outlines strategies to turn disputes into opportunities for understanding.

title: Unpacking Societal Expectations on Ageing
caption: What societal narratives shape your experience of ageing?
layout: Two-columns contrasting traditional expectations of ageing women with the empowering narrative. Each section presents insights and actions to redefine personal experiences.

title: Strengthening Emotional Intelligence
caption: How aware are you of your emotional landscape?
layout: Circle diagram featuring the key components of emotional intelligence: Self-Awareness, Self-Regulation, Motivation, Empathy, and Social Skills. Each segment presents tools for enhancing emotional intelligence in relationships.

title: The Intimacy Spectrum
caption: Where do you fall on the intimacy spectrum?
layout: Spectrum line chart illustrating forms of intimacy: Casual, Committed, Intimate Friends, and Deep Lovers. Each point includes brief descriptions and reflection questions for personal evaluation.

title: Creating Rituals for Connection
caption: What rituals do you cherish with your loved ones?
layout: 4-block section diagram with each block dedicated to a type of ritual: Daily, Weekly, Seasonal, and Life Events. Each block offers examples and tips for creating meaningful connections through rituals.
